title: What’s causing an engine shake in my 10-year-old SUV?
author: John Paul
bullets: A 2016 Audi Q5 experienced engine shaking at high speeds, accompanied by a check engine and EPC light.
John Paul advises that a flashing check engine light suggests an engine misfire, recommending the vehicle be towed for repair.
The EPC light in the Audi indicates a potential fault in the throttle system or related electronics.

title: 5 takeaways as Red Sox fall flat against Rays on Mother’s Day
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: The Boston Red Sox lost 4-1 to the Tampa Bay Rays, struggling in pitching, defense, and offense on Mother's Day.
Payton Tolle started for the Red Sox, allowing three earned runs over five innings during an emotionally challenging outing.
Mickey Gasper stood out for Boston, going 3-for-4 with an RBI, while Willson Contreras exited early due to a hand contusion.

title: Boston gang members, associates facing slew of firearm, drug trafficking charges
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Eight gang members and associates face charges for firearm and drug trafficking in Boston, Brockton, Randolph, and southeastern Massachusetts.
The investigation led to the seizure of 18 firearms, 20 machine gun conversion devices, and large quantities of fentanyl and crack cocaine.
Defendants face severe penalties, including up to life in prison for fentanyl distribution and up to 15 years for firearm possession.

title: Photos: Scenes from a fun, but soggy, Saturday in Greater Boston
author: Boston.com Staff
bullets: Families attended LEGO Group's Duckling Day event on Boston Common, featuring duck-themed activities with LEGO DUPLO bricks.
Somerville's PorchFest included performances by local musicians like Charlie & Audrey and Good Trouble Brass Band.
Mojo Boston Music Festival held a 10-hour event at City Hall Plaza showcasing contemporary sound and urban art.

title: New Bedford uncle pleads guilty to killing nephew during family altercation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Juan Padilla-Santana pleaded guilty to manslaughter in the death of his nephew, Omil Padilla-Corsino.
He was sentenced to 12 ½ to 17 ½ years in prison in Fall River Superior Court.
The stabbing occurred during an argument in a New Bedford apartment on August 24, 2024.

title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 2-1 comeback win against the Philadelphia Union
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution secured a 2-1 comeback win over Philadelphia Union at Gillette Stadium.
Luca Langoni and Carles Gil scored for the Revolution after a first-half own goal by Will Sands.
The victory marked Revolution's sixth consecutive home win, maintaining an undefeated record at Gillette Stadium in 2026.

title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Matt Damon hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Matt Damon hosted the May 9, 2026 episode of 'Saturday Night Live,' marking his third time as host.
Damon's episode featured standout sketches, including a Mother’s Day monologue and a cat litter commercial.
Aziz Ansari returned as FBI Director Kash Patel in the cold open with Damon as Brett Kavanaugh.

title: Tracy McGrady clarifies comments about Jaylen Brown’s ‘frustration’ with Celtics
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Tracy McGrady clarified he hasn't spoken with Jaylen Brown about alleged frustrations with the Celtics organization.
McGrady's comments were based on observations and not conversations with Brown, noting media and social media behavior.
Brown publicly stated his satisfaction with the Celtics, calling the past season his favorite, despite McGrady's claims.

title: Pedro Martinez comments on Red Sox’ decision to reassign Jason Varitek’s role
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Pedro Martinez comments on the reassignment of former catcher Jason Varitek within the Red Sox organization.
Martinez has not spoken with Varitek about the decision and is unsure of the reasons behind the change.
Martinez expressed confidence that recently fired Red Sox staff, including Alex Cora, will find new roles in MLB.

title: Report: Giannis Antetokounmpo would like to be traded to ‘true contender’
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo reportedly wants a trade to an Eastern Conference team that's a true championship contender.
The Celtics have expressed interest in Antetokounmpo and have the assets to potentially facilitate a trade.
Teams like the 76ers, Knicks, Pistons, Cavaliers, and Celtics are mentioned as possible destinations.
